content: Active tenant context in ASP.NET Core MVC: Two main patterns. (1) Claims-based: after login, if user is in multiple groups, write ActiveGroupId claim or store in a custom claim; requires cookie re-issue on switch (SignInManager.RefreshSignInAsync). (2) Session-based: store int ActiveGroupId in HttpContext.Session after login or switch; resolved per-request by ITenantService reading Session["ActiveGroupId"]. For MVC + cookie auth (not JWT), session is simpler and avoids re-issuing auth cookie. HttpContext.Items can hold resolved tenant for single request. Pattern: middleware or action filter reads session, resolves group, writes to HttpContext.Items["ActiveGroupId"] for use by DbContext factory.
